subcodes.first_line: O assured leaf and faithful handmaid of God! The calamity that hath befallen hath caused grief to pure hearts and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه و امة الله المومنه مصیبت وارده سبب حزن قلوب طاهره گردیده و فی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @consolation and comfort, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
